titel: Report on companies with state ownership for the year 2026.
html: In the report, the government provides an overview of the management of state-owned companies and the operations of the companies managed by the Prime Minister's Office as of the turn of the year 2025/26. The report also covers the activities carried out by Svenska skeppshypotekskassan, Stiftelsen Industrifonden, and Stiftelsen Norrlandsfonden.
tldr: The government is reporting on how it has managed the companies in which the state holds ownership, as well as the operations of three specific funds and a loan institution.
lattlast:
The government has published a report detailing how it has managed the companies in which the state holds ownership stakes. The report provides an overview of the operations of these companies during the turn of the year, specifically covering 2025 and 2026.

In addition to information on the standard companies, the report also includes details about the activities of three specific organizations: Svenska skeppshypotekskassan, Stiftelsen Industrifonden, and Stiftelsen Norrlandsfonden.

The purpose of this text is to provide a clear overview of how state funds and ownership have been managed within these various entities.
